title: Pricing
heroSub: RIMBOAI runs on tokens — one balance for images, video, voice, and music. Pick a pack that matches your pace. Top up anytime.
freeRibbonSub: Sign up, claim starter tokens, and open the Lab — no card required.
choosePackSub: Estimates show what you can create — exact usage depends on model and settings.
compareSub: Same models everywhere — the difference is runway, queue, and support.
modelGuideSub: Approximate token costs for popular RIMBOAI Lab models.
faqSub: Straight answers about tokens, packs, and the Lab.
ctaSub: Jump into the Lab, remix Trends, and ship from Innovation — with tokens that move at your speed.
footerNote: Token estimates are guides, not guarantees.

taglines.starter: Perfect for trying out AI generation
taglines.creator: Perfect for content creators

notices.switchDzd: Payments are processed in Algerian Dinar (DZD) via SofizPay. Prices switched to DZD — tap Get Started again to continue.
notices.checkoutError: Could not start the payment. Please try again.

faqs.a1: Tokens are the fuel for every generation in the Lab. Each model costs a different amount based on quality and length.
faqs.a2: No. Token packs are balance top-ups. Your tokens stay until you use them.
faqs.a3: Yes. Every active pack unlocks the same models — the difference is how many generations you can run.
faqs.q4: Can I top up again later?
faqs.a4: Anytime. Open Buy Tokens from the header or Pricing page.
faqs.a5: Prices are shown in USD, EUR, GBP, or DZD. Checkout in Algeria is processed in DZD via SofizPay.
faqs.q6: What if I only want to try the platform?
faqs.a6: Create a free account and claim starter tokens to explore the Lab.
